name: thesis-reading-skill

argument-hint: "research topic, uploaded PDFs, reading questions, output format, paper count"
---

# Thesis Reading Skill

This workspace keeps the full implementation at the repository root.

Before using this skill, read [../../../SKILL.md](../../../SKILL.md) and follow its procedure. The executable scripts are in [../../../scripts](../../../scripts), reference documents are in [../../../references](../../../references), and report templates are in [../../../templates](../../../templates).
